title: STAT+: Large drugmakers are developing fewer antibiotics, analysis finds
summary: The number of potential antimicrobial treatments being developed by the world’s largest drugmakers nosedived by 35% over the past five years, according to a new analysis.

summary: Removing race from the eGFR had a big impact, resulting in 5.3 more kidney transplants per 1000 Black candidates.

summary: Vertex said a drug it secured as part of a $4.9 billion acquisition successfully reduced by half a key marker of a kidney disease known as IgA nephropathy.

title: Ipsen to withdraw cancer drug acquired in buyout due to safety concerns
